scripts.clean: find packages -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -delete && find packages -maxdepth 2 -name dist -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.nuke: npm run clean && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.rebuild:clean: npm run nuke && npm install && npm run build && cd packages/yaw-example && npm install
scripts.dev: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; npm run build:watch & npm run dev --prefix packages/yaw-example & wait
